personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer / AI Pipeline Engineer

summary: Senior Data Engineer and AI pipeline practitioner with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across AWS data platforms, Python automation, SQL, ETL, observability, and production reporting. Strong fit for AWS conversational analytics and agentic data workflows through hands-on experience with S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, Python-based pipelines, RAG-style retrieval, LLM integrations, quality gates, and business-facing automation. Known for translating complex operational and analytics requirements into reliable, documented data solutions with monitoring, data quality, and stakeholder trust built in.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing legacy manual processes with automated, repeatable data delivery for enterprise capacity and reporting use cases.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena-style analytical access patterns, and Redshift workloads to support scalable forecasting, reporting, and operational analytics.

Developed ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead, combining data engineering, statistical modeling, validation, and stakeholder-facing reporting.

Created executive dashboards and reporting datasets from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and other monitoring feeds, improving visibility into infrastructure utilization, performance, and operational risk.
Implemented data quality, reconciliation, documentation, monitoring, and troubleshooting practices for recurring reporting cycles in a regulated banking environment.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS and supported CI/CD-aware delivery patterns, operational readiness, and production issue resolution for data processing workloads.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting production observability, alerting, and performance analysis.
Led the FAST analytics project, data-mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to surface optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, improving operational understanding of user-facing performance.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning and monitoring readiness assessments, connecting application performance data to engineering decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services environment, managing enterprise-scale monitoring with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly exports and improving repeatability.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and operational reporting standards used by application and infrastructure teams.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and training materials that helped teams adopt monitoring and performance engineering practices.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC platform, validating data correctness across phased cutover activities.
Optimized database access and transaction processing using C++, OCCI, SQL, and Oracle performance techniques while maintaining reliability under high transaction volume.
Built automated validation and testing utilities to support data migration accuracy, regression checks, and production readiness.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON, XML

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers. The workflow performs semantic duplicate detection, job scoring, resume and cover tailoring, quality checks, and application tracking using structured JSON artifacts and reproducible automation.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock concepts to support analytics, Text-to-SQL, data access, and scalable ETL patterns. Focused on data quality, documentation, Parquet optimization, and practical AI/data integration.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-assisted capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to replace manual forecasting with repeatable data pipelines, predictive analytics, and stakeholder-facing dashboards.
